# doctest (vendored)

Single-header C++ test framework used by `tests-cpp/`.

- **Source:** https://github.com/doctest/doctest
- **Version:** v2.4.11 (pinned; both `doctest.h` and `doctest.cmake` from the same release tag)

## Files

| File | License | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `doctest.h` | MIT (see `LICENSE.txt`) | The single-header library. |
| `doctest.cmake` | BSD 3-Clause (CMake / Kitware) | Provides `doctest_discover_tests`; auto-generated by upstream CMake from gtest's `gtest_discover_tests`. |
| `LICENSE.txt` | MIT | Copyright Viktor Kirilov, 2016-2023. |

Both licenses are permissive and compatible with daslang's BSD-3-Clause license.

## How to upgrade

```sh
cd tests-cpp/3rdparty/doctest
VER=v2.4.12   # pick new tag
curl -fsSL -o doctest.h     https://raw.githubusercontent.com/doctest/doctest/$VER/doctest/doctest.h
curl -fsSL -o doctest.cmake https://raw.githubusercontent.com/doctest/doctest/$VER/scripts/cmake/doctest.cmake
curl -fsSL -o LICENSE.txt   https://raw.githubusercontent.com/doctest/doctest/$VER/LICENSE.txt
```

Then update the version number above and run `ninja test` to verify nothing broke.
